subcodes.first_line: Praised be Thou, O Lord my God! Thou seest my poverty and my misery, my troubles and my needs
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری فقری و افتقاری و ضری و اضطراری و عجزی و انکساری و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @station of the Manifestation of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @justice and wrath of God
